Chat Edit: 'Please ensure the entire Plan of Action is completed:

Directory Structure & Organization

Move all related files (memory modules, agentic systems, AI integrations, IDE components) into D:\Security Research aka GitHub Repos\ProjectIDEAI\electron for a clean, unified workspace.
Agentic IDE Integration

Ensure the IDE can browse/search all files, scaffold/generate codebases, and use every feature (file explorer, editor, terminal, extensions, browser, etc.).
Implement full system navigation (C:/, D:/, etc.) and external program access.
Memory Module Integration

Integrate all OpenMemory PowerShell modules (Storage, Embed, Query, Decay, Http) into the IDE backend.
Connect the memory system to the IDE’s chat, agent, and orchestration panels.
Ensure persistent, context-aware memory for all agentic actions.
Ollama Model Support

Auto-detect and connect to local/offline Ollama models.
Use models for code completion, suggestions, and agentic reasoning.
Support 1 million token context (streaming, chunking, or local vector search).
Professional IDE Features

Restore and polish all VS Code-level features: file explorer sidebar, syntax highlighting, IntelliSense, debugger, git integration, extension marketplace, themes, split panes, global search, refactoring tools.
Ensure all menu items (Tools, Settings, Extensions) are fully functional.
Agentic AI System

Create a built-in, offline-capable LLM agent (no external APIs required).
Allow browser/web access only if absolutely needed, with a local knowledge database for learning and recall.
Scaffold/generate entire codebases and projects autonomously.
Dashboard & Visualization

Integrate a modular agentic dashboard (HTML, VS Code panel, or TUI) for memory lifecycle, embedding visualization, user summaries, and decay monitoring.
Warnings & Cleanup

Remove deprecated activation events from extensions targeting VS Code engine ^1.75.
Fix all variable redeclaration and module loading errors.
Clean up and organize all files/directories for maximum elegance.'
